title: Cipher - A daily word guessing game (everybody gets the same word daily)
description: A daily word guessing game where everybody gets the same word each day.

title: $10 to Hate Someone
description: A missed parlay turns into yelling at a stranger on TV, which turns into tracing how much further this kind of betting has already gone.

title: I Built Hover-Info Cards So My Writing Can Breathe
description: A sentence with three parenthetical asides was the breaking point. Footnotes and tooltips had already failed.

title: Building Rosovo.org and What It Did to My Motivation
description: It was supposed to be a one-page portfolio. It didn't stay that way.

title: The website Rosovo.org has been created!
War is More Affordable Than Ever
description: From volunteer FPV teams to millions of units, Ukraine flipped battlefield math by using $400 drones to trade up against million-dollar armor and force armies to relearn war in real time.

title: What I Learned Selling a Drug That Isn't One
description: Jars labeled "not for human consumption" share shelf space with wellness flyers, and one regular comes back from the hospital for more.

title: The Importance of Making Art That Sucks
description: The idea of failing as a good thing, explored.
